headline: Iran Wants to Keep the Strait of Hormuz Closed. Military Experts Say Reopening It Could Take Weeks.
summary: Iran’s leader said the Strait of Hormuz should remain closed, and military experts say reopening the vital oil shipping route could take weeks or even months.

raw.headline: Iran Wants to Keep the Strait of Hormuz Closed. Military Experts Say Reopening It Could Take Weeks.

headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid TXT and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Textron has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 10.1%. Its stock price has climbed to $92.42, representing a healthy 12.4% increase. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
